data.title: Value Line, Inc. declares $0.325 quarterly cash dividend per share on its 9,409,522 outstanding shares.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) revealed its decision to distribute a quarterly cash dividend of $0.325 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid out on August 11, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as stockholders on July 28, 2025. The company disclosed that it presently has 9,409,522 shares of common stock in circulation as of July 18, 2025.

data.title: Coca-Cola appoints Luisa Ortega as new Europe president, succeeding Nikos Koumettis who retires in 2026 after 25-year career. Koumettis will remain as senior advisor, serving on board in India. Ortega joined in 2019.
data.description: Coca-Cola announced that Luisa Ortega will take over as president of the Europe operating unit on Sept. 1, replacing Nikos Koumettis who is retiring in 2026 after 25 years with the company. Koumettis will stay on as a senior advisor until Feb. 28, 2026. He will also join the board of directors of Hindustan Coca-Cola Beverages Pvt. Ltd., an Indian company-owned bottler. Ortega, who joined Coca-Cola in 2019, will be stepping into the new role, marking an important transition within the company's leadership.

data.title: Silver reaches $39, highest since 2011, sparking predictions of a significant bull run.
data.description: A recent news commentary from USA News Group on behalf of Magma Silver Corp revealed an important development in the silver market. In the past week, silver prices surged past $39, reaching the highest point since 2011. This increase has caught the attention of analysts who are now speculating on the potential implications of this price spike.

data.title: Gibbons Pools marks 50 years in 2025, known for residential pools, expanding to wellness and stainless-steel construction.
data.description: Celebrating its 50th anniversary in 2025, Gibbons Pools, a family-owned business now in its third generation, has grown significantly. Initially focusing on residential pools, the company has diversified to encompass wellness amenities and stainless-steel construction. Based in Long Island, N.Y., the company is recognized for its premium offerings in the luxury market.

data.title: Bitcoin's value up due to Wall Street interest, but poses risks like regulatory pressure and loss of core ethos.
data.description: The presence of institutional capital in the Bitcoin market has led to increased stability and recognition, but it has also brought about potential systemic risks, regulatory scrutiny, and a slow erosion of its fundamental principles. This trend has been highlighted by significant investments from institutional players, resulting in a rise in Bitcoin's value and status. However, the influence of institutions has raised concerns about the coin's original ethos and its vulnerability to regulatory interventions. As more institutional money flows into the cryptocurrency, it is crucial to monitor the balance between stability, growth, and preserving Bitcoin's decentralized nature.

data.title: Rep Scott Fitzgerald tours former grade school now housing, discusses challenges with Federal Home Loan Bank in Muskego.
data.description: In Muskego, Wisconsin, U.S. Representative Scott Fitzgerald (WI-05) collaborated with the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) and local officials to address housing affordability issues in Wisconsin. The discussion, which included a visit to a converted affordable housing site at a former Muskego grade school, involved stakeholders such as Associated Bank and the Wisconsin Partnership for Housing Development, Inc. The dialogue highlighted the challenges faced by communities in the state regarding housing affordability.

data.title: Senate to review Trump's CFTC nominee amid uncertainty over crypto regulation. Brian Quintenz may be the lone US commissioner by 2025.
data.description: The Senate Agriculture Committee is scheduled to listen to Brian Quintenz as a potential candidate for the chairmanship of the CFTC. If Quintenz is confirmed, he may become the only commissioner at the US regulator by the conclusion of the year 2025.

data.title: GoSecure announces GoSec 25, a cybersecurity conference in Montreal on Sept 10-11, 2025, bringing professionals together.
data.description: Montreal will be hosting the GoSec 25 cybersecurity conference on September 10–11, 2025, organized by GoSecure. The event aims to bring together cybersecurity experts from various industries to collaborate on important issues. The conference will be held both in downtown Montreal and online, catering to a wide audience.
